creator: riggs@rrr.de
text:
Hi,

On Mon, 12. Nov 2007, at  4:00 +0700, Eugene Grosbein wrote
according to [Re: ports/117962: [patch] multimedia/mplayer: add an option for AMR audio codecs]:

> Yes. There are ports audio/libamrnb and audio/libamrwb that refer to
> these tarballs. Perhaps, it's possible to force mplayer to use these
> ports but that would involve heavy patching of mplayer source without
> any real benefit. So I've decided to follow directions from amr.c
> and that gives excellent results.

thanks for clearing this up and provide some more details. As you may
know, I am in the middle of upgrading the mplayer port to rc2, so I'll
have a look how your patches are doing with it so that we can bundle
this upgrade.

Cheers,
Riggs

-- 
- "[...] I talked to the computer at great length and
-- explained my view of the Universe to it" said Marvin.
--- And what happened?" pressed Ford.
---- "It committed suicide." said Marvin.
